title: cyclosorus caespitosus
intro: Cyclosorus caespitosus, also known as the creeping fern or basket fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is commonly found in shaded areas, often growing on rocks and hillsides. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Cyclosorus caespitosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
